description: Buy Now CTA changes from green to red (same text, same position)
notes: Empirically the CTA flip moves ~0.43% of pixels at 1440x900 — well below strict's 0.5% threshold. So strict CANNOT catch a small-area color flip on its own. Whether that's the right behavior is the open question; expectation softened to null until the team decides whether to tighten strict or accept this.
